---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or screen recordings if helpful.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- App version / commit: [e.g. 1.0.0 or git SHA]
- Running as: [Electron desktop / browser at studio.radical.tools]
- Node.js version (if building from source): [e.g. 20.12.0]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
